subject: international_private
note: Seed list — add more concepts via extract_concepts.py from your PDFs

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当涉外民事关系触及多个法律体系时，确定应适用哪国法律的问题
concepts.brief_definition_en: The problem of determining which legal system's law should govern a cross-border civil relationship
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当事人通过协议选择适用于其合同关系的法律的权利
concepts.brief_definition_en: The right of parties to choose the law governing their contractual relationship by agreement
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国际私法中确定法律适用的桥梁性因素，如国籍、住所、行为地
concepts.brief_definition_en: The pivotal element linking a legal relationship to a particular legal system, such as nationality, domicile, or place of acting
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 法院依冲突规则指向外国法时，是否应包括该外国的冲突法本身
concepts.brief_definition_en: Whether reference to a foreign law includes that country's conflict of laws rules, potentially sending the matter back
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 适用外国法的结果若明显违背法院地的基本社会道德与价值观时，拒绝适用
concepts.brief_definition_en: Refusal to apply foreign law when its application would be manifestly incompatible with fundamental domestic values
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 确定某一涉外法律问题属于哪一类法律关系，以找到适当冲突规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: The process of categorizing a legal issue to identify the appropriate conflict of laws rule to apply
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 自然人与特定法律体系的法律依附关系，通常为永久居所地加意图
concepts.brief_definition_en: The legal tie between a person and a particular legal system, typically requiring physical presence and intent to remain
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 受理案件法院所在地的法律，通常适用于诉讼程序性事项
concepts.brief_definition_en: The law of the forum (the court hearing the case), typically applied to procedural matters
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 法律行为实施地的法律，传统上适用于合同订立地等
concepts.brief_definition_en: The law of the place where an act was performed, traditionally applied to formation of contracts
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 财产（尤其是不动产）所在地的法律，通常适用于对物权的调整
concepts.brief_definition_en: The law of the place where property is situated, usually governing rights in rem over that property
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当事人在多个可能有管辖权的法院中选择对自己最有利的法院提起诉讼
concepts.brief_definition_en: A party's strategic selection of the most favorable available court from multiple courts with potential jurisdiction
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 合同或侵权适用与争议关系最密切联系地法律的灵活标准
concepts.brief_definition_en: The flexible standard applying the law of the jurisdiction most significantly related to the transaction or occurrence
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 主要争议的解决取决于一个附属性涉外法律问题，该问题应独立适用冲突规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: A subsidiary foreign law question whose resolution is necessary to decide the main issue, requiring independent conflict of laws analysis
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.name_zh: 外国判决的承认与执行
concepts.name_en: Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Judgments
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 一国法院承认和执行另一国法院判决的条件与程序
concepts.brief_definition_en: The conditions and procedures under which a court recognizes and gives effect to a judgment rendered by a foreign court
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 跨境商事争议通过仲裁解决的机制，具有当事人自治、中立性与可执行性优势
concepts.brief_definition_en: The mechanism for resolving cross-border commercial disputes through arbitration, offering party autonomy, neutrality, and enforceability
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 仲裁庭有权自行裁定其是否具有管辖权，包括仲裁协议的效力
concepts.brief_definition_en: The principle that arbitral tribunals have the power to rule on their own jurisdiction, including the validity of the arbitration agreement
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 仲裁协议与主合同相互独立，主合同无效不自动导致仲裁协议无效
concepts.brief_definition_en: The arbitration clause is independent from the main contract, so invalidity of the main contract does not automatically void it
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 关于承认与执行外国仲裁裁决的最重要国际条约，170余国缔约
concepts.brief_definition_en: The preeminent international treaty on recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral awards, ratified by 170+ states
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 确定哪国法院有权审理涉外民事案件的规则体系
concepts.brief_definition_en: The body of rules determining which state's courts may exercise jurisdiction over cross-border civil disputes
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 法院虽有管辖权但认为另一法院是更适当的审判地，可中止或驳回诉讼
concepts.brief_definition_en: The doctrine allowing a court with valid jurisdiction to decline in favor of a more convenient alternative forum
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.name_en: Fraude à la Loi / Evasion of Law
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 当事人人为制造连接点以规避本应适用的法律，该行为不受保护
concepts.brief_definition_en: The artificial manipulation of connecting factors to evade otherwise applicable law, which the forum may refuse to recognize
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 区分实体问题（适用外国法）与程序问题（适用法院地法）的困难与后果
concepts.brief_definition_en: The difficult distinction between substantive issues (governed by foreign law) and procedural ones (governed by lex fori)
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 冲突规范所指向、实际规范当事人涉外民事关系的那个国家的实体法
concepts.brief_definition_en: The substantive law of a particular state designated by conflict of laws rules to govern a cross-border relationship
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 规范婚姻实质有效性要件的属人法，各国采用国籍法或住所地法不同立场
concepts.brief_definition_en: The personal law (nationality or domicile law) governing substantive validity requirements of marriage
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 跨国遗产继承适用被继承人属人法还是财产所在地法的分裂与统一论争
concepts.brief_definition_en: The debate between unified (personal law) and split (lex situs for immovables) approaches to cross-border succession
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 跨境侵权行为适用侵权行为地法、结果发生地法或最密切联系地法的规则
concepts.brief_definition_en: Rules determining whether cross-border torts are governed by the law of the place of acting, injury, or most significant relationship
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 将冲突规则整合为系统性法典的立法运动及各国经验比较
concepts.brief_definition_en: The legislative movement to systematize conflict of laws rules into comprehensive codes, with comparative national experiences
concepts.subject: international_private

concepts.name_en: Hague Conference on Private International Law
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 致力于国际私法统一化的政府间组织，产生了众多国际私法公约
concepts.brief_definition_en: The intergovernmental organization dedicated to unifying private international law through multilateral conventions
concepts.subject: international_private
